title: Current state for wilsonle/speech
status: v0.6.0 documentation candidate; release gates still open

workflows.dictate: Install required speech model in place, record by holding microphone button or Space, edit transcript locally, and use menu actions for download/clear.
workflows.vocabulary: Compact set list with on/off state, word counts, search, basic word editor, and Advanced disclosure for steering/diagnostics.
workflows.models: Compact voice-model list, focused create/enroll/train/results/import/export/storage workflows, and detail accordions for optional evidence.
workflows.settings: Settings index routes Audio, Storage, Privacy, Keyboard shortcuts, Diagnostics, and About behind the app menu.
workflows.diagnostics: Dense aggregate diagnostics and redacted support bundle live only on /settings/diagnostics.

contractsPreserved: local-first privacy and no telemetry by default
worker ownership for inference, training, import/export, hashing, and storage lifecycle
model-pack, vocabulary, profile, adapter, portable-bundle, and route-migration compatibility contracts
offline app-shell and model lifecycle semantics

schemas.speechModelExport: Encrypted .speechmodel export is worker-owned and excludes recordings/training checkpoints
schemas.legacyProfileExport: Legacy .speechprofile export remains under details because it may include sensitive enrollment data

openReleaseGates: Issue #255 remains open for final moderated release-usability participant evidence or explicit human release decision.
Production accuracy/performance claims remain bounded by ADR 0004 and ADR 0005 until evidence exists.
Publication/update/offline restart/rollback verification remains for later v0.6 release issues.
nextPlanningInstruction: Plan only the user's next requested delta against this current state, preserve the open release-evidence gates, and write a successor snapshot when that delta completes.
